step_rationale: ADP-activated platelet receptor; antithrombotic target; clopidogrel and prasugrel antagonist.
mechanism: P2Y12 is the platelet ADP receptor central to platelet aggregation and thrombosis; therapeutic target for antiplatelet therapy.
